Package neqsim.process.safety.barrier

Class DocumentEvidence

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.barrier.DocumentEvidence
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class DocumentEvidence extends Object implements Serializable
Traceable evidence extracted from technical documentation for a safety decision.

The evidence object is intentionally small and serializable so agents can carry references from P&IDs, cause and effect charts, safety requirement specifications, technical requirements, inspection reports, and vendor data sheets into barrier registers and audit reports.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • DocumentEvidence

      public DocumentEvidence(String evidenceId, String documentId, String documentTitle, String revision, String section, int page, String sourceReference, String excerpt, double confidence)
      Creates a document evidence record.
      Parameters:
      evidenceId - stable evidence identifier
      documentId - source document identifier or number
      documentTitle - source document title
      revision - document revision identifier
      section - clause, drawing zone, table, or section reference
      page - one-based page number, or 0 when not applicable
      sourceReference - path, URI, tag reference, or repository-local source pointer
      excerpt - short supporting text extracted from the source
      confidence - extraction confidence in the range 0 to 1

  • Method Details

    • normalize

      private static String normalize(String value)
      Normalizes nullable text values for safe JSON export.
      Parameters:
      value - text value to normalize
      Returns:
      trimmed text or an empty string

    • isTraceable

      public boolean isTraceable()
      Checks whether the evidence has enough source detail for audit traceability.
      Returns:
      true when a document or source reference and excerpt are present

      Converts the evidence to a JSON-friendly map.
